corpus.title: DOJ drops New York Times subpoenas over Air Force 1 reports
corpus.signal_text:
DOJ drops New York Times subpoenas over Air Force 1 reports

The U.S. government will withdraw subpoenas of New York Times journalists over their reporting on President Trump's Qatari-gifted jet, the Department of Justice said in a Thursday court hearing. Why it matters: The Trump administration backed down in its battle with the media on the eve of the rescheduled White House Correspondents' Association Dinner, where the president is expected to speak.Driving the news: U.S. District Judge Arun Subramanian reportedly grilled the Trump administration in a

corpus.title: U.S. government withdraws subpoenas aimed at compelling 3 NYT reporters to identify sources
corpus.signal_text:
U.S. government withdraws subpoenas aimed at compelling 3 NYT reporters to identify sources

Criticized by a federal judge for sloppy legal work, the U.S. government on Thursday withdrew subpoenas that would have compelled three New York Times reporters to testify about their sources for articles about U.S. President Donald Trump's Qatari-gifted Air Force One jet.

corpus.title: Trump administration drops New York Times subpoenas over Air Force One reporting
corpus.signal_text:
Trump administration drops New York Times subpoenas over Air Force One reporting

The White House had targeted journalists from The New York Times for their reporting on security concerns with a Qatari-donated Air Force One plane.

corpus.title: Gobierno de Trump retira citaciones judiciales a periodistas de The New York Times
corpus.signal_text:
Gobierno de Trump retira citaciones judiciales a periodistas de The New York Times

Los reporteros indicaron que habían sido citados para saber cuáles fueron las fuentes que les informaron sobre la fallas de seguridad del nuevo avión de Trump, entregado por el Gobierno de Qatar

corpus.title: Gobierno de Trump retira citaciones judiciales a periodistas del New York Times que denunciaron fallas en sistemas de seguridad del avión presidencial
corpus.signal_text:
Gobierno de Trump retira citaciones judiciales a periodistas del New York Times que denunciaron fallas en sistemas de seguridad del avión presidencial

El diario catalogó las citaciones ante un gran jurado federal como un intento de intimidar a sus periodistas.

corpus.title: Governo Trump recua e retira intimações a jornalistas do New York Times
corpus.signal_text:
Governo Trump recua e retira intimações a jornalistas do New York Times

O Departamento de Justiça dos Estados Unidos retirou nesta quinta-feira (23) as intimações que buscavam registros telefônicos de jornalistas do The New York Times que haviam reportado sobre as capacidades de segurança do novo avião Air Force One do presidente Donald Trump, doado pelo Qatar. corpus.title: US to withdraw subpoenas issued to New York Times journalists
corpus.signal_text:
US to withdraw subpoenas issued to New York Times journalists

The Justice Department said that it would withdraw the subpoenas that sought phone records and grand jury testimony from New York Times journalists.

corpus.title: U.S. Justice Department withdraws NY Times subpoenas over Trump plane report
corpus.signal_text:
U.S. Justice Department withdraws NY Times subpoenas over Trump plane report

The newspaper had challenged the government requests for phone records of reporters and grand jury testimony as an attempt to "intimidate" the press and filed a motion to have them quashed

corpus.title: DOJ withdraws NYT reporters’ subpoenas after judge calls it ‘sloppy legal work’
corpus.signal_text:
DOJ withdraws NYT reporters’ subpoenas after judge calls it ‘sloppy legal work’

‘Subpoenas are the last step, not the first step, but the last step,’ the judge declared, referencing rules designed to safeguard First Amendment rights
